🚀 Hiring: Java Backend Developer / Java Backend Lead 🚀
📌 Job Title: Java Backend Developer / Java Backend Lead
📍 Location: Charlotte, NC (Onsite)
💼 Job Type: Fulltime (H1B Transfer Accepted)
Key Responsibilities:
✅ Lead backend development teams and technical initiatives
✅ Architect and design scalable microservices using Spring Boot
✅ Drive end-to-end application delivery and technical execution
✅ Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and enterprise integrations
✅ Optimize backend services for performance, scalability, and reliability
✅ Ensure compliance with banking security and regulatory standards
✅ Troubleshoot production issues and perform root cause analysis (RCA)
✅ Mentor junior engineers and support best engineering practices
Required Skills:
✔️ Core Java (Java 8/11/17+)
✔️ Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Cloud
✔️ Microservices Architecture
✔️ MongoDB (Mandatory)
✔️ Kafka / RabbitMQ
✔️ REST APIs, Postman, Swagger
✔️ Hibernate / JPA
✔️ Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL
✔️ Jenkins, Git, Maven
✔️ Docker, Kubernetes
✔️ Cloud Platforms: AWS / Azure / GCP
Preferred Qualifications:
✅ Banking / Payments domain experience
✅ Experience with Core Banking, Digital Payments, and Fraud Systems
✅ Understanding of PCI-DSS, Encryption, Security Controls, and Audit Logging
✅ Strong problem-solving and leadership skills
📩 Interested candidates can share their updated resume or connect directly.

🚀 Java is evolving faster than ever, and staying updated is no longer optional.
As backend systems become more scalable and performance-driven, modern Java features help developers write cleaner, faster, and more maintainable code.
Here are 5 Java 21 features every Java developer should know:
🔹 Virtual Threads (Project Loom) – Lightweight concurrency for high-throughput applications.
🔹 Pattern Matching for switch – Cleaner and more expressive conditional logic.
🔹 Record Patterns – Simplifies extracting data from immutable objects.
🔹 Sequenced Collections – Consistent APIs for ordered collections.
🔹 String Templates (Preview) – Safer and more readable string construction.
These features improve:
✅ Performance
✅ Readability
✅ Scalability
✅ Developer Productivity
#Java #Java21 #SpringBoot #BackendDevelopment #Microservices #SoftwareEngineer #Programming #Developers #OpenToWork #Kafka #Docker #Kubernetes #AWS #Coding #Tech
